info.title: Azure Monitor Data Collection Control Plane API
info.description: Provides comprehensive operations for working with Azure Monitor data collection rules, endpoints, and associations. This API enables management of telemetry collection, transformation, and routing configurations.

get.description: Lists associations for the specified resource.

parameters.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.

etag.description: "If etag is provided in the response body, it may also be provided as a header per the normal etag convention.  Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.")

DataCollectionRule.description: Definition of what monitoring data to collect and where that data should be sent.

description.description: Description of the data collection rule.

immutableId.description: The immutable ID of this data collection rule. This property is READ-ONLY.

dataCollectionEndpointId.description: The resource ID of the data collection endpoint that this rule can be used with.

endpoints.description: Defines the ingestion endpoints to send data to via this rule.

references.description: Defines all the references that may be used in other sections of the DCR

agentSettings.description: Agent settings used to modify agent behavior on a given host

streamDeclarations.description: Declaration of custom streams used in this rule.

dataSources.description:
The specification of data sources.
This property is optional and can be omitted if the rule is meant to be used via direct calls to the provisioned endpoint.

directDataSources.description:
The specification of direct data sources.
This property is optional and can be omitted.

DataCollectionRuleAgentSettings.description: Agent settings used to modify agent behavior on a given host

Definition of which data will be collected from a separate VM extension that integrates with the Azure Monitor Agent.
Collected from either Windows and Linux machines, depending on which extension is defined.

PerfCounterDataSource.description:
Definition of which performance counters will be collected and how they will be collected by this data collection rule.
Collected from both Windows and Linux machines where the counter is present.

streams.description:
List of streams that this data source will be sent to.
A stream indicates what schema will be used for this data and usually what table in Log Analytics the data will be sent to.

samplingFrequencyInSeconds.description: The number of seconds between consecutive counter measurements (samples).

counterSpecifiers.description:
A list of specifier names of the performance counters you want to collect.
Use a wildcard (*) to collect a counter for all instances.
To get a list of performance counters on Windows, run the command 'typeperf'.

transformKql.description: The KQL query to transform the data source. This is a deprecated property and will be removed in future versions.

A friendly name for the data source.
This name should be unique across all data sources (regardless of type) within the data collection rule.
